messages.text: The lightdrinker wisp drifts through you and drinks the warmth from your blood, leaving a spreading numbness. The blow {verb} you!
The lightdrinker wisp gutters toward you and thins to a smear of deeper dark before it can touch you.
The lightdrinker wisp settles over your heart and drinks deep, and the cold of it stops your breath! The blow {verb} you!
